content:
# IVX REELS + DEALS — P0 UI MIGRATION, ROOT AUDIT, FIX, DEPLOY AND LIVE VERIFICATION

MODE: EXECUTE NOW
PRIORITY: P0
SCOPE: Native app Main module, Reels module, Landing page, Deal detail routes, media cards, deep links, API/data mapping and production deployment.

DO NOT RETURN A PLAN ONLY.
DO NOT RETURN NARRATIVE CLAIMS.
DO NOT MARK VERIFIED WITHOUT REAL LIVE PROOF.
DO NOT KEEP BOTH OLD AND NEW REEL CARD SYSTEMS ACTIVE.
DO NOT ASK FOR CREDENTIALS UNLESS a real runtime request proves missing, expired, revoked, 401 or 403.

==================================================
OWNER-APPROVED DESIGN DECISION
==================================================

KEEP this NEW immersive full-screen reel card design:

- Full-screen vertical video/image
- Investment and Active badges
- Property title and location
- ROI
- Minimum investment
- Minimum ownership
- Tokenized
- JV Deal
- Buyer/investment category buttons
- Like
- Comment
- Save
- Share
- Audio control
- View Deal
- Invest Now
- Smooth vertical reel scrolling

Use this new reel card in:

1. Main/Home module
2. Reels module
3. Native Android app
4. Native iOS app
5. Expo development build
6. Public landing page
7. Authenticated landing/feed page

REMOVE this OLD Instagram feed-style property card:

- Small rectangular card
- Header/avatar above the media
- Media constrained inside a post box
- Like/comment/share row under the media
- Large card footer with View Deal and Invest Now
- Duplicate card presentation on Main
- Duplicate card presentation on Landing

The old card must not remain hidden behind a feature flag, old route, fallback component, alternate breakpoint or stale mobile layout.

==================================================
CURRENT CONFIRMED BUGS
==================================================

BUG 1:
Main module still displays the old Instagram-style deal card.

BUG 2:
Landing page still displays the old deal/reel card.

BUG 3:
New full-screen reel design exists but is not used consistently across Main, Reels and Landing.

BUG 4:
Opening a displayed reel/deal can become stuck forever on:

“Loading Deal”
“Fetching investment details...”

BUG 5:
Deal display and Deal Detail are not fully connected end to end.

BUG 6:
Possible mismatch between:
- reel ID
- property ID
- investment ID
- deal ID
- slug
- route parameter
- API lookup key

BUG 7:
Possible duplicate components or separate data sources are creating inconsistent UI and behavior.

==================================================
PHASE 1 — DISCOVER EVERY OLD AND NEW CARD
==================================================

Search the complete repository for every component, route and reference related to:

- ReelCard
- ReelsCard
- DealCard
- InvestmentCard
- PropertyCard
- FeedCard
- InstagramCard
- HomeFeed
- MainFeed
- LandingFeed
- ReelsFeed
- ExploreFeed
- FullScreenReel
- ReelItem
- DealPreview
- ViewDeal
- InvestNow
- LoadingDeal
- Fetching investment details

Return the exact files discovered.

Identify:

1. Which component renders the approved new full-screen reel.
2. Which component renders the old Instagram-style card.
3. Every screen still importing the old component.
4. Every responsive/web variant.
5. Every fallback renderer.
6. Every feature flag controlling cards.
7. Every cached/stale card implementation.
8. Every route that opens Deal Detail.

Do not assume there is only one old card.

==================================================
PHASE 2 — CREATE ONE CANONICAL REEL CARD
==================================================

Create or designate one shared canonical component:

CanonicalInvestmentReelCard

It must support:

- native app
- native web
- public landing
- authenticated landing
- main feed
- reels feed

Use shared design tokens and shared business logic.

Required properties:

- reelId
- dealId
- propertyId
- investmentId
- slug
- title
- subtitle
- location
- mediaUrl
- mediaType
- posterUrl
- roi
- minimumInvestment
- minimumOwnership
- status
- category
- likeCount
- commentCount
- saveCount
- shareCount
- isLiked
- isSaved
- audioEnabled
- onOpenDeal
- onInvest
- onLike
- onComment
- onSave
- onShare

Do not duplicate business logic between Main, Reels and Landing.

==================================================
PHASE 3 — REMOVE OLD CARD END TO END
==================================================

Replace every old-card import with the canonical new reel card in:

- Main/Home
- Reels
- Landing
- Public feed
- Authenticated feed
- Search results where reel media is shown
- Property preview where reel style is intended

Delete or deprecate the old component only after confirming no active import remains.

Run repository-wide checks proving:

- zero production imports of old card
- zero route references to old card
- zero fallback references
- zero mobile breakpoint references
- zero web breakpoint references
- zero duplicated old markup

If an old card is still required for an unrelated admin screen, rename it clearly and prevent it from rendering in customer-facing Main, Reels or Landing.

==================================================
PHASE 4 — FIX DEAL OPENING AND INFINITE LOADING
==================================================

Audit the complete path:

Displayed reel
→ user taps reel / View Deal
→ route generated
→ route parameter parsed
→ API request
→ database lookup
→ response mapping
→ Deal Detail render

Test every possible lookup key:

- deal.id
- deal.slug
- property.id
- investment.id
- reel.id
- external ID
- UUID
- numeric ID

Choose one canonical route contract.

Recommended contract:

/deal/[dealId]

or

/investments/[dealId]

The same exact identifier must be used by:

- Main reel
- Reels module
- Landing reel
- View Deal
- Invest Now
- Share deep link
- Notification deep link
- Saved items
- Search results

Fix any route that sends one ID type while the destination expects another.

==================================================
PHASE 5 — LOADING, ERROR AND TIMEOUT BEHAVIOR
==================================================

The Deal Detail screen must never remain on infinite loading.

Implement:

1. Maximum request timeout.
2. Abort/cancel stale requests.
3. Retry button.
4. Back button.
5. Specific not-found state.
6. Specific unauthorized state.
7. Specific network-failure state.
8. Trace ID on backend failures.
9. Safe fallback when optional fields are missing.
10. Skeleton only while an active request is pending.
11. Automatic retry only for retryable failures.
12. No endless spinner after request completion.

Required states:

- LOADING
- LOADED
- NOT_FOUND
- UNAUTHORIZED
- NETWORK_ERROR
- SERVER_ERROR
- INVALID_ROUTE
- RETRYING

Never display “Loading Deal” indefinitely.

==================================================
PHASE 6 — DATABASE AND API AUDIT
==================================================

Audit actual tables/views used for reels and deals, including all relevant:

- properties
- investments
- deals
- jv_deals
- reels
- landing_deals
- media
- property_media
- investment_media
- saved_items
- likes
- comments

Verify:

- every displayed reel links to an existing deal
- every deal has a valid primary media item
- every media URL is valid
- no orphan reels
- no deleted deal still appears in feed
- no null route ID
- no duplicate deals
- status filtering is correct
- display order is correct
- public visibility is respected
- owner-only records are not public
- landing uses production data, not mock data
- app and landing read the same canonical records

Create a controlled audit report listing:

- displayed reel ID
- linked deal ID
- linked property ID
- route generated
- API status
- database row found
- detail render result
- PASS/FAIL

==================================================
PHASE 7 — REEL UX QA
==================================================

Test the canonical reel card for:

- vertical swipe
- smooth snap behavior
- autoplay active item only
- pause inactive item
- mute/unmute
- app background/resume
- image fallback
- video poster
- slow network
- missing media
- orientation changes
- Android back button
- iOS navigation
- tablet layout
- web mobile viewport
- desktop landing viewport
- no page jumping
- no layout shift
- no card height recalculation loop
- no overlapping bottom navigation
- no overlapping system navigation
- no clipped View Deal or Invest Now buttons

The reel must fit the usable viewport, accounting for:

- status bar
- safe area
- header
- bottom navigation
- Android navigation bar
- browser toolbar on mobile web

==================================================
PHASE 8 — BUTTON AND ACTION QA
==================================================

Test every action independently:

1. Tap anywhere intended to open deal.
2. View Deal.
3. Invest Now.
4. Like.
5. Unlike.
6. Comment.
7. Save.
8. Unsave.
9. Share.
10. Copy deep link.
11. Audio mute.
12. Audio unmute.
13. Category selector.
14. Tokenized.
15. JV Deal.
16. Buyer/Investor option.
17. Profile/company link.
18. Back from Deal Detail.
19. Return to exact previous reel position.
20. Refresh feed.

Acceptance:

- one tap produces one action
- no duplicate requests
- no duplicate likes
- no duplicate saved records
- no route to wrong property
- no loss of scroll position
- no infinite loading
- no silent failure

==================================================
PHASE 9 — ROOT-BY-ROOT DEAL TESTING
==================================================

Discover every deal route in the repository and test them individually.

For every route return:

- route path
- source screen
- identifier type
- expected destination
- actual destination
- API endpoint
- HTTP status
- response ID
- render result
- latency
- trace ID
- PASS/FAIL

At minimum test:

- Main → Deal
- Reels → Deal
- Landing → Deal
- Search → Deal
- Saved → Deal
- Portfolio → Deal
- Notification → Deal
- Shared deep link → Deal
- Direct URL → Deal
- Logged-out public route
- Logged-in member route
- Investor route
- Owner route
- Invalid ID
- Deleted ID
- Missing media
- Slow API
- API 401
- API 404
- API 500

==================================================
PHASE 10 — REGRESSION TESTS
==================================================

Add automated tests for:

- Main uses canonical new reel card
- Reels uses canonical new reel card
- Landing uses canonical new reel card
- old reel card has zero production imports
- reel ID maps to correct deal ID
- View Deal opens correct deal
- Invest Now opens correct investment flow
- invalid ID exits loading state
- API 404 displays not-found state
- API timeout displays retry state
- media failure displays fallback
- feed retains position after returning
- duplicate actions are prevented
- public landing hides restricted deals
- app and landing return the same deal data
- every seeded production reel resolves to a real detail record

==================================================
PHASE 11 — BUILD AND DEPLOY
==================================================

Run the real repository commands for:

- dependency install
- lint
- typecheck
- unit tests
- integration tests
- route tests
- reel UI tests
- deal detail tests
- production web build
- Android production build
- backend build
- production smoke tests

Fix all P0 and P1 failures related to this scope.

Then:

1. Commit to the owner-controlled repository.
2. Push to the production branch.
3. Deploy backend if API or routing changed.
4. Deploy landing page.
5. Produce updated Android APK/build if native code changed.
6. Confirm production SHA matches GitHub SHA.
7. Clear stale CDN/build cache where required.
8. Verify live app and live landing.

==================================================
MANDATORY LIVE VERIFICATION
==================================================

Use real production data and prove:

1. Main shows the new full-screen reel card.
2. Main no longer shows the old card.
3. Reels shows the new full-screen reel card.
4. Landing shows the new full-screen reel card.
5. Landing no longer shows the old card.
6. Casa Rosario opens successfully.
7. View Deal opens the correct Casa Rosario record.
8. Invest Now opens the correct investment flow.
9. No infinite “Loading Deal” screen.
10. Like/comment/save/share work.
11. Returning from Deal Detail restores the same reel.
12. Android real-device test passes.
13. Production web mobile test passes.
14. Production landing test passes.

==================================================
RELEASE GATE
==================================================

Do not mark VERIFIED unless all are present:

- GitHub commit SHA
- branch
- changed file list
- zero production imports of old card
- test command outputs
- typecheck result
- build result
- backend deploy ID, when changed
- landing deploy ID
- Android build ID/version
- production health result
- deployed SHA
- live Main screenshot
- live Reels screenshot
- live Landing screenshot
- live Casa Rosario Deal Detail screenshot
- successful Deal API response
- real device evidence
- no P0 or P1 issue remaining

==================================================
MANDATORY FINAL REPORT
==================================================

TASK UNDERSTOOD:
[exact scope]

ROOT CAUSES:
1.
2.
3.

OLD CARD FILES FOUND:
-
-

CANONICAL NEW CARD:
- File:
- Used by Main:
- Used by Reels:
- Used by Landing:

FILES INSPECTED:
-
-

FILES CHANGED:
-
-

OLD CARD REMOVAL PROOF:
- Production imports before:
- Production imports after:
- Search command:
- Result:

DEAL ROUTES TESTED:
1. Route:
   Source:
   ID type:
   API:
   Status:
   Render:
   PASS/FAIL:

DATA INTEGRITY:
- Reels checked:
- Valid deal links:
- Broken links:
- Orphan records:
- Duplicates:

COMMANDS RUN:
- Command:
  Exit code:
  Result:

TEST RESULTS:
- Main:
- Reels:
- Landing:
- Deal detail:
- View Deal:
- Invest Now:
- Deep links:
- Android:
- Web:
- Real device:

TYPECHECK:
- PASS/FAIL
- Error count:

BUILD:
- PASS/FAIL
- Build IDs:

GITHUB PROOF:
- Repository:
- Branch:
- Commit SHA:
- Push timestamp:

DEPLOYMENT PROOF:
- Backend service:
- Backend deploy ID:
- Landing deploy ID:
- Android version/build:
- Deployed SHA:
- Deployment timestamp:

LIVE PROOF:
- Main URL/screen:
- Reels URL/screen:
- Landing URL:
- Casa Rosario route:
- Deal API status:
- Trace ID:
- Screenshots/video references:

BUGS FIXED:
1.
2.
3.

REMAINING ISSUES:
- NONE or exact issue

STATUS:
VERIFIED / FAILED / BLOCKED

RULE:
VERIFIED is allowed only after the old card is removed from Main and Landing, the new canonical reel is live in Main/Reels/Landing, Casa Rosario Deal Detail loads successfully, and production evidence is attached.
